/usr/bin/arm-linux-gnueabihf-g++  -march=armv7-a -mfpu=neon -mfloat-abi=hard  -static-libstdc++ -static-libgcc CMakeFiles/camera_streamer.dir/app/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_streamer.dir/capture/v4l2_device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_streamer.dir/pipeline/capture_worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_streamer.dir/pipeline/encode_worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_streamer.dir/pipeline/publish_worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_streamer.dir/pipeline/stats_worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_streamer.dir/encode/mjpeg_encoder_stub.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_streamer.dir/publish/rtsp_publisher_stub.cpp.o  -o camera_streamer  -lpthread
